report.summary: UX audit of all 5 new interactive calculator components from today's build cycle — fixed focus styles, accessibility (aria-labels, roles), mobile responsive layouts, invalid CSS, and wired dynamic OG images for 10 new learn pages.

sections.title: UX Audit Findings
items: PendleYieldCalc: no focus styles on 4 inputs, no aria-labels, Quick Scenario 'Conservative' preset used assetPrice '1' instead of realistic value
CryptoTaxEstimator: invalid CSS color syntax (background: '#3fb950/20' not valid), no focus styles on inputs/selects, NIIT toggle button missing checkbox role and aria-checked
EthenaYieldCalc: result grid (grid-cols-3) too cramped on mobile — Principal/Earnings/Balance all squeezed, range slider missing aria-label
PectraValidatorCalc: Before/After 3-column grid (1fr auto 1fr) breaks on mobile — arrow + 2 panels don't fit on 375px, no focus styles on inputs, no aria-labels
MemeLaunchpadComparison: search input missing aria-label and focus styles, comparison table missing aria-label for screen readers

sections.title: UX Improvements Implemented
items: PendleYieldCalc: added focus border (#6366f1) + blur reset on all 4 inputs (investment, PT price, asset price, maturity date)
PendleYieldCalc: added aria-labels to all inputs ('Investment amount in USD', 'PT price per 1 underlying asset', 'Underlying asset price in USD', 'Maturity date')
PendleYieldCalc: fixed Conservative preset assetPrice from '1' to '3400' (realistic ETH price)
CryptoTaxEstimator: removed invalid duplicate background/border properties, fixed to use only rgba() color syntax
CryptoTaxEstimator: added focus handlers with border-color transition to all inputs and selects
CryptoTaxEstimator: added aria-labels to sale price, cost basis, bracket selects
CryptoTaxEstimator: added role='checkbox' and aria-checked to NIIT toggle button for screen reader support
EthenaYieldCalc: changed result grid from grid-cols-3 to grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 — stacks on mobile
EthenaYieldCalc: added aria-label to APY range slider with dynamic percentage display
PectraValidatorCalc: added responsive CSS media query — Before/After grid stacks to single column at ≤640px, arrow rotates 90°
PectraValidatorCalc: added focus handlers with indigo border transition to both inputs
PectraValidatorCalc: added aria-labels to Total ETH and ETH Price inputs
MemeLaunchpadComparison: added aria-label to search input ('Search launchpad platforms')
MemeLaunchpadComparison: added focus/blur border handlers to search input
MemeLaunchpadComparison: added aria-label to comparison table element

sections.title: OG Images Wired (Dynamic)
items: Replaced static PNG references with dynamic /api/og endpoint across all 10 new learn pages (3 references each: openGraph, twitter, article schema = 30 total)
/learn/stablecoin-payments-guide-2026 → /api/og?title=Stablecoin+Payments+Guide+2026&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/pendle-finance-guide → /api/og?title=Pendle+Finance+Guide&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/quantum-resistant-crypto-guide → /api/og?title=Quantum+Resistant+Crypto&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/best-perpetual-dex-guide → /api/og?title=Best+Perpetual+DEXs&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 → /api/og?title=Crypto+Tax+Guide+2026&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide → /api/og?title=Ethereum+Pectra+Upgrade&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/sonic-blockchain-guide → /api/og?title=Sonic+Blockchain&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/ethena-usde-guide → /api/og?title=Ethena+USDe&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/genius-act-stablecoin-guide → /api/og?title=GENIUS+Act+Stablecoin&category=Learn&type=learn
/learn/best-meme-coin-launchpads-2026 → /api/og?title=Meme+Coin+Launchpads&category=Learn&type=learn

sections.title: Verification
items: TypeScript check passed with --skipLibCheck: 0 new errors in any modified components
Pre-existing errors only in AICourseRecommendations.tsx (unescaped quotes) — not from this cycle
All 5 calculator components compile cleanly
All 10 learn page metadata updated without breaking exports
